objective: Define and execute the full SMARTHAUS agentic workforce expansion program so Claude can delegate through UCP into a governed M365 pack that covers the full explicitly-inventoried Microsoft 365 capability universe across all departments and personas.
decision_rule: The workforce is not complete until the full department/persona universe, the full governable M365 capability universe, the bounded executor and auth model, the digital-employee runtime, the department packs, the Claude/UCP delegation layer, the live certification evidence, and the final release decision are all green. Documentation or isolated slices alone are not sufficient.
prompt_discipline: Every grouped phase and every child act in this plan must have one formal MATHS prompt pair under docs/prompts/. Prompt files must follow the MATHS template structure and the repo two-file prompt rule.
workload_universe_targets: Devices, endpoint management, and adjacent Windows admin surfaces

completed.summary: Locked the authoritative department and persona census by removing the stray non-authoritative bonus department from registry/ai_team.json, proving the resulting roster resolves to 39 personas across 10 departments, cross-checking all roster agent IDs against registry/agents.yaml, and recording the locked census in docs/commercialization/m365-department-persona-census.md.

Locked the workload universe at the family level in docs/commercialization/m365-workload-universe-inventory.md by grounding the expansion target in official Microsoft workload references, the repo's current 184-action registry surface, and an explicit family inventory that now drives downstream capability taxonomy and routing work.

Normalized the locked workload-family inventory into docs/commercialization/m365-capability-taxonomy-and-feasibility-map.md by defining canonical implementation-status, feasibility, auth, and licensing classes that downstream persona, routing, and certification phases must use.

Bound the authoritative 39-persona roster to explicit workload families, capability families, risk tiers, approval profiles, and coverage statuses in registry/persona_capability_map.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-persona-capability-and-risk-map.md, while explicitly documenting the 20 non-authoritative overflow registry agents as inventory rather than workforce authority.

Converted the authority wave into an explicit execution sequence through registry/workforce_release_wave_map.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-workforce-release-wave-and-completion-map.md, defining bounded program waves, exit criteria, unlocks, and claim limits so the remaining workforce build-out proceeds in deterministic increments.

Defined the canonical workforce action contract in registry/universal_action_contract_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-universal-action-contract-v2.md, proving through the notebook-backed L23 chain that the repo's CAIO, capability-registry, and agent-registry action dialects can project deterministically into one v2 identity, semantics, execution, governance, and evidence envelope.

Replaced the scattered hardcoded executor tables with registry/executor_routing_v2.yaml and the shared src/smarthaus_common/executor_routing.py resolver, then projected that authority into ops-adapter routing, persona-domain derivation, and the instruction router so canonical v2 actions and current legacy aliases all resolve deterministically to one bounded executor domain.

Defined the machine-readable auth authority in registry/auth_model_v2.yaml, added the shared src/smarthaus_common/auth_model.py resolver, extended src/ops_adapter/actions.py so delegated, app_only, and hybrid execution preferences are projected through the shared routing surface for user-context actions, and proved the resulting contract through the notebook-backed L25 chain plus targeted auth-model regressions.

Defined the machine-readable approval and risk authority in registry/approval_risk_matrix_v2.yaml, added the shared src/smarthaus_common/approval_risk.py resolver, projected deterministic risk_class, approval_profile, approvers, and matrix-enforced approval metadata into src/ops_adapter/main.py and src/ops_adapter/approvals.py, and proved the resulting fail-closed governance contract through the notebook-backed L26 chain plus targeted approval-risk regressions.

Defined the machine-readable unified audit authority in registry/unified_audit_schema_v2.yaml, added the shared src/smarthaus_common/audit_schema.py builder, projected the canonical audit envelope into src/ops_adapter/audit.py and src/provisioning_api/audit.py, updated the bounded instruction-audit verifier to the v2 schema, and proved the shared evidence contract through the notebook-backed L27 chain plus targeted audit-schema regressions.

Expanded the first post-control-plane workload slice through registry/entra_directory_expansion_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-entra-directory-expansion-v2.md, projected deterministic Entra and directory actions into src/smarthaus_graph/client.py and src/provisioning_api/routers/m365.py, aligned the v2 routing/auth/approval registries and CAIO/capability contracts, and proved the slice through the notebook-backed L28 chain, scripts/ci/verify_entra_directory_expansion.py, and targeted E2A regressions.

Expanded Outlook / Exchange messaging through registry/outlook_exchange_expansion_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-outlook-exchange-expansion-v2.md, projected mail, calendar, mailbox, shared-mailbox, and contact actions into the shared Graph client and instruction router, aligned the CAIO/capability/routing/auth/approval contracts, added the notebook-backed L29 chain and scripts/ci/verify_outlook_exchange_expansion.py, and proved the bounded E2B slice through contract verifiers plus targeted messaging regressions.

Expanded SharePoint / OneDrive / files work through registry/sharepoint_onedrive_files_expansion_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-sharepoint-onedrive-files-expansion-v2.md, projected deterministic site, list, drive, and drive-item actions into src/smarthaus_graph/client.py and src/provisioning_api/routers/m365.py, aligned the CAIO/capability/routing/auth/approval contracts, added the notebook-backed L30 chain and scripts/ci/verify_sharepoint_onedrive_files_expansion.py, and proved the bounded E2C slice through contract verifiers plus targeted SharePoint/files regressions.

Expanded Teams / Groups / Planner work through registry/teams_groups_planner_expansion_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-teams-groups-planner-expansion-v2.md, projected deterministic team, channel, plan, bucket, and task actions into src/smarthaus_graph/client.py and src/provisioning_api/routers/m365.py, aligned the CAIO/capability/routing/auth/approval contracts, added the notebook-backed L31 chain and scripts/ci/verify_teams_groups_planner_expansion.py, and proved the bounded E2D slice through contract verifiers plus targeted collaboration and Planner regressions.

Expanded documents / spreadsheets / presentations work through registry/documents_spreadsheets_presentations_expansion_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-documents-spreadsheets-presentations-expansion-v2.md, projected deterministic DOCX/XLSX/PPTX generation into src/smarthaus_common/office_generation.py, extended the shared Graph client and instruction router for create/update document/workbook/presentation actions, aligned the CAIO/capability/routing/auth/approval contracts, added the notebook-backed L32 chain and scripts/ci/verify_documents_spreadsheets_presentations_expansion.py, and proved the bounded E2E slice through contract verifiers plus targeted productivity regressions.

Expanded Power Automate through registry/power_automate_expansion_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-power-automate-expansion-v2.md, projected bounded flow discovery, owner governance, lifecycle control, run-history, and explicit callback actions into src/smarthaus_common/power_automate_client.py and src/provisioning_api/routers/m365.py, aligned the CAIO/capability/routing/auth/approval contracts, added the notebook-backed L33 chain and scripts/ci/verify_power_automate_expansion.py, and proved the bounded E3A slice through contract verifiers plus targeted Power Automate regressions.

Expanded Power Apps through registry/power_apps_expansion_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-power-apps-expansion-v2.md, projected bounded app, role, ownership, environment, and environment-role actions into src/smarthaus_common/power_apps_client.py and src/provisioning_api/routers/m365.py, aligned the CAIO/capability/routing/auth/approval contracts, added the notebook-backed L34 chain and scripts/ci/verify_power_apps_expansion.py, and proved the bounded E3B slice through contract verifiers plus targeted Power Apps regressions.

Expanded Power BI through registry/power_bi_expansion_v2.yaml and docs/commercialization/m365-power-bi-expansion-v2.md, projected bounded workspace, report, dataset, dataset-refresh, and dashboard actions into src/smarthaus_common/power_bi_client.py and src/provisioning_api/routers/m365.py, aligned the CAIO/capability/routing/auth/approval contracts, added the notebook-backed L35 chain and scripts/ci/verify_power_bi_expansion.py, and proved the bounded E3C slice through contract verifiers plus targeted Power BI regressions.

prepared_blocked.summary: Inventory the full M365 capability universe, lock the department and persona census, and define what complete workforce coverage actually means before implementation expands.
Bring workflow automation, app surfaces, forms, and analytics into the same governed workforce control plane.
Bring forms, connector-backed workflow triggers, and approval integrations into the canonical action surface.
Define reusable end-to-end recipes spanning multiple M365 workloads.
Extend the workforce to the enterprise-control workloads that require the strictest governance, approvals, and minimum-permission boundaries.
Add governed device inventory, compliance, and lifecycle operations.
Add governed security alert, incident, score, and response operations.
Add governed compliance, policy, and discovery operations.
Add governed identity-protection and conditional-access administration.
Unify remaining admin-center and governance controls into the workforce plane.
Turn the persona model into an actual digital workforce runtime that can own work, hold queues, preserve state, and act like a managed staff layer.
Complete the authoritative persona registry with all required fields, constraints, and runtime projections.
Support natural requests like talking to Elena Rodriguez instead of targeting raw agents.
Give personas deterministic task queues, state, and lifecycle management.
Bind performance, ownership, accountability, and escalation into the runtime contract.
Define bounded, auditable persona memory and work-history semantics.
Package the workforce into department-operable capability sets so each department has its own governed digital team and workflows.
Build the Operations department capability pack.
Build the HR department capability pack.
Build the Communication department capability pack.
Build the Engineering department capability pack.
Build the Marketing department capability pack.
Build the Product department capability pack.
Build the Project Management department capability pack.
Build the Studio Operations department capability pack.
Build the Testing department capability pack.
Build the Design department capability pack.
Make the full workforce actually usable through Claude and UCP with humanized delegation, orchestration, and executive control.
Define the top-level delegation contract between Claude, UCP, and the workforce runtime.
Make it easy to find and target the right digital employee for a request.
Support composed multi-step work across workload and persona boundaries.
Allow digital employees to hand off, collaborate, and coordinate within governed bounds.
Give executives visibility and intervention controls across the workforce runtime.
Prove the expanded workforce in the live tenant, by workload, persona, department, and cross-department workflows, before release claims are made.
Certify each workload surface against the live tenant and the bounded executor model.
Certify each persona class against its allowed domains and approval posture.
Certify each department pack against its target workflows and responsibilities.
Certify cross-functional workflows spanning multiple departments and personas.
Close the formal workforce release gate with live evidence and explicit sign-off.
Package, onboard, launch, and support the complete workforce with an explicit commercial and operational model.
Package the full workforce offering and supported capability sets for customers.
Define the onboarding path for the expanded workforce product.
Define rollout phases, acceptance, and expansion across customers and departments.
Define the final operating, support, and customer-ownership boundaries for the full workforce.
Issue the final release decision for the full workforce program.

open_blockers: The implemented action surface now covers directory, messaging, SharePoint/files, collaboration/Planner, bounded Office productivity, bounded Power Automate, and bounded Power Apps, but most workload families and live-certification layers remain beyond the previously shipped v1 slice.
No department pack beyond the standalone v1 surface has been certified or released.

requirements.name: Full M365 workload and capability universe inventory
Canonical capability, licensing, API, and auth taxonomy
Universal action contract and bounded executor routing
Core workload expansion across identity, messaging, files, and collaboration
Power Platform, analytics, and connector expansion
Enterprise admin, security, and compliance expansion
Live validation, certification, and release closure
Governance synchronization and prompt inventory completeness

phase_stack.title: Universe Definition and Boundary Lock
phase_stack.goal: Inventory the full M365 capability universe, lock the department and persona census, and define what complete workforce coverage actually means before implementation expands.

children.title: Department and Persona Census
children.goal: Lock the authoritative department roster and all digital-employee personas that the workforce must support.

children.title: M365 Workload Universe Inventory
children.goal: Enumerate every M365 workload and adjacent Microsoft admin surface relevant to the workforce target.

children.title: Capability Taxonomy and Feasibility Map
children.goal: Normalize all identified capabilities into one taxonomy with implementation feasibility, licensing, and exposure status.

children.title: Persona-to-Capability and Risk Mapping
children.goal: Bind personas and departments to required capabilities, risk classes, and approval posture.

children.title: Release-Wave and Completion Map
children.goal: Define the executable wave structure and completion criteria for the full workforce program.

phase_stack.title: Universal M365 Control Plane
phase_stack.goal: Extend the control plane so the pack can absorb the full M365 capability universe through deterministic action contracts, executor routing, and unified audit/governance rules.

children.title: Universal Action Contract v2
children.goal: Define the canonical action contract that can represent the expanded workforce action surface.

children.title: Executor Routing v2
children.goal: Route actions by workload and domain through bounded executors instead of monolithic identities.

children.title: Auth Model v2
children.goal: Define app-only, delegated, and hybrid execution rules per capability and workload.

children.title: Approval and Risk Matrix v2
children.goal: Classify the expanded action universe into deterministic approval and risk classes.

children.title: Unified Audit Schema v2
children.goal: Normalize actor, persona, executor, approval, and result evidence across the expanded workforce.

phase_stack.title: Core M365 Workload Expansion
phase_stack.goal: Implement the foundational business and admin workloads that make the workforce broadly useful across identity, communication, files, and collaboration.

children.title: Entra / Directory Expansion
children.goal: Expand identity, group, license, and directory administration capabilities.

children.title: Outlook / Exchange Expansion
children.goal: Expand mail, calendar, shared mailbox, contact, and messaging operations.

children.title: SharePoint / OneDrive / Files Expansion
children.goal: Expand site, list, library, file, record, and permission operations.

children.title: Teams / Groups / Planner Expansion
children.goal: Expand team, channel, membership, group, and task-management operations.

children.title: Documents / Spreadsheets / Presentations Expansion
children.goal: Expand Word, Excel, and PowerPoint workflows through deterministic generation and update paths.

phase_stack.title: Power Platform and Analytics Expansion
phase_stack.goal: Bring workflow automation, app surfaces, forms, and analytics into the same governed workforce control plane.

children.title: Power Automate Expansion
children.goal: Add governed automation-flow discovery, invocation, lifecycle, and monitoring.

children.title: Power Apps Expansion
children.goal: Add governed Power Apps interaction and administration surfaces.

children.title: Power BI Expansion
children.goal: Add governed report, dataset, workspace, and analytics surfaces.

children.title: Forms / Approvals / Connectors Expansion
children.goal: Bring forms, connector-backed workflow triggers, and approval integrations into the canonical action surface.

children.title: Cross-Workload Automation Recipes
children.goal: Define reusable end-to-end recipes spanning multiple M365 workloads.

phase_stack.title: Enterprise Admin and Security Expansion
phase_stack.goal: Extend the workforce to the enterprise-control workloads that require the strictest governance, approvals, and minimum-permission boundaries.

children.title: Intune / Devices Expansion
children.goal: Add governed device inventory, compliance, and lifecycle operations.

children.title: Security / Defender Expansion
children.goal: Add governed security alert, incident, score, and response operations.

children.title: Compliance / Retention / eDiscovery Expansion
children.goal: Add governed compliance, policy, and discovery operations.

children.title: Conditional Access / Identity Protection Expansion
children.goal: Add governed identity-protection and conditional-access administration.

children.title: Admin and Governance Surface Expansion
children.goal: Unify remaining admin-center and governance controls into the workforce plane.

phase_stack.title: Digital Employee Runtime
phase_stack.goal: Turn the persona model into an actual digital workforce runtime that can own work, hold queues, preserve state, and act like a managed staff layer.

children.title: Persona Registry Completion
children.goal: Complete the authoritative persona registry with all required fields, constraints, and runtime projections.

children.title: Humanized Delegation Interface
children.goal: Support natural requests like talking to Elena Rodriguez instead of targeting raw agents.

children.title: Persona Task Queues and State
children.goal: Give personas deterministic task queues, state, and lifecycle management.

children.title: Persona KPIs, Ownership, and Escalation
children.goal: Bind performance, ownership, accountability, and escalation into the runtime contract.

children.title: Persona Memory and Work History
children.goal: Define bounded, auditable persona memory and work-history semantics.

phase_stack.title: Department Packs
phase_stack.goal: Package the workforce into department-operable capability sets so each department has its own governed digital team and workflows.

children.title: Operations Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Operations department capability pack.

children.title: HR Department Pack
children.goal: Build the HR department capability pack.

children.title: Communication Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Communication department capability pack.

children.title: Engineering Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Engineering department capability pack.

children.title: Marketing Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Marketing department capability pack.

children.title: Product Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Product department capability pack.

children.title: Project Management Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Project Management department capability pack.

children.title: Studio Operations Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Studio Operations department capability pack.

children.title: Testing Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Testing department capability pack.

children.title: Design Department Pack
children.goal: Build the Design department capability pack.

phase_stack.title: Claude / UCP Workforce Experience
phase_stack.goal: Make the full workforce actually usable through Claude and UCP with humanized delegation, orchestration, and executive control.

children.title: Claude to UCP Universal Delegation Contract
children.goal: Define the top-level delegation contract between Claude, UCP, and the workforce runtime.

children.title: Persona Discovery and Selection
children.goal: Make it easy to find and target the right digital employee for a request.

children.title: Multi-Step Task Orchestration
children.goal: Support composed multi-step work across workload and persona boundaries.

children.title: Cross-Persona Collaboration
children.goal: Allow digital employees to hand off, collaborate, and coordinate within governed bounds.

children.title: Executive Oversight and Intervention Controls
children.goal: Give executives visibility and intervention controls across the workforce runtime.

phase_stack.title: Live Validation and Workforce Certification
phase_stack.goal: Prove the expanded workforce in the live tenant, by workload, persona, department, and cross-department workflows, before release claims are made.

children.title: Workload Certification
children.goal: Certify each workload surface against the live tenant and the bounded executor model.

children.title: Persona Certification
children.goal: Certify each persona class against its allowed domains and approval posture.

children.title: Department Certification
children.goal: Certify each department pack against its target workflows and responsibilities.

children.title: Cross-Department Workflow Certification
children.goal: Certify cross-functional workflows spanning multiple departments and personas.

children.title: Enterprise Release Gate v2
children.goal: Close the formal workforce release gate with live evidence and explicit sign-off.

phase_stack.title: Launch and Operating Model
phase_stack.goal: Package, onboard, launch, and support the complete workforce with an explicit commercial and operational model.

children.title: Workforce Packaging
children.goal: Package the full workforce offering and supported capability sets for customers.

children.title: Customer Onboarding v2
children.goal: Define the onboarding path for the expanded workforce product.

children.title: Pilot and Rollout Model v2
children.goal: Define rollout phases, acceptance, and expansion across customers and departments.

children.title: Support Boundary v2
children.goal: Define the final operating, support, and customer-ownership boundaries for the full workforce.

children.title: Workforce Expansion Release Decision
children.goal: Issue the final release decision for the full workforce program.
